summary: Static code review for Privacy & Security section restructuring in React Native/Expo app. All requirements verified: Danger Zone removed, Privacy Settings link removed, Export/Reset moved into Privacy & Security card with correct order.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: No standalone 'Danger Zone' section exists - grep for 'Danger Zone', 'danger-zone', 'AlertTriangle.*header' returned no matches
VERIFIED: No 'Privacy Settings' pressable linking to /privacy-settings - grep for 'router.push.*privacy-settings' and '/privacy-settings' returned no matches

VERIFIED: Privacy & Security card contains 4 sections in correct order: 1) Change PIN (line 713-737), 2) Privacy Policy & Terms (line 739-761), 3) Export All Data (line 763-817), 4) Reset All Data (line 819-873)
VERIFIED: data-testid='export-data-button' exists at line 787 inside Privacy & Security card
VERIFIED: data-testid='reset-all-data-button' exists at line 845 inside Privacy & Security card
VERIFIED: AlertTriangle icon still imported (line 29) and used in reset confirmation modal (line 1156)
VERIFIED: TypeScript compilation passes - only pre-existing CSS import warning (unrelated to this change)

success_rate.backend: N/A - React Native app, no backend APIs

context_for_next_testing_agent: This is a React Native/Expo mobile app. No web frontend exists for Playwright testing. Testing was done via static code analysis and TypeScript compilation. The Privacy & Security section restructuring is complete.
